section.div: This repository provisions the foundational cloud infrastructure and deploys the core open-source MLOps tool stack on AWS Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS) and EC2 instances.
This repository contains automation code for provisioning and managing Google Cloud Platform (GCP) infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible.
Self-hosted Kubernetes on AWS EC2 using Terraform, Ansible, and Vault with kubeadm for secure and automated cluster provisioning.
Deployment scripts & config for Sock Shop
Sample cloud-first application with 10 microservices showcasing Kubernetes, Istio, and gRPC.
Make your first PR request! And enter the world of Open Source Contributions 🍉
